The '''Battle of Skorrupon''' was a battle fought against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] on [[Skorrupon/Legends|Skorrupon]].

==The battle==
At some point during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], [[Arani Korden]], [[Deel Surool]] and [[Rorworr (Naboo)|Rorworr]] confronted [[High Inquisitor]] [[Volytar]] in his private retreat on [[Skorrupon/Legends|Skorrupon]]. They intercepted the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitor]] while he was trying to board his private [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] and escape to his [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]]. Eventually, they battled Volytar who surrounded himself with eight [[Droideka/Legends|destroyer droids]] in a room filled with pop-up [[Grenade/Legends|grenade]] traps.<ref name="GCG" />

==Aftermath==
Some [[Time/Legends|time]] after the battle, Korden, Surool and Rorworr became known as the "heroes of Skorrupon" and eventually parted ways.<ref name="GCG" />

Korden returned to her [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] and became a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]].<ref name="GCG" />

Surool used his new celebrity status to become a [[Holovid/Legends|holovid]] star, until a major [[Spice/Legends|spice]] scandal forced him to disappear into the criminal underworld where he became a [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]].<ref name="GCG" />

With the fall of the Empire at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Rorworr passed up a position within the New Republic to become an independent [[Scout/Legends|explorer]]. He took his ship, a modified [[Svelte-class Imperial shuttle|''Svelte''-class shuttle]],<ref name="RSL" /> on a grand tour of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. He then proceeded to explore the galaxy alone, mourning the loss of his friend [[Sia-Lan Wezz]].<ref name="GCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Purge.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Sia-Lan Wezz's death on Kessel, as featured on the cover of ''Star Wars: Purge'']]
The Battle of Skorrupon was first mentioned in ''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]'', a ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' supplement published by [[Wizards of the Coast]] in [[August]] [[2003]].<ref name="GCG" />

''Galactic Campaign Guide'' implied that Sia-Lan Wezz was [[Death/Legends|killed]] at the Battle of Skorrupon.<ref name="GCG" /> This was later changed with the release of the [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] [[Purge (comic book)|''Star Wars: Purge'']] in [[December]] [[2005]], which showed the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi's]] death at the hands of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] during the [[Conclave on Kessel]].<ref name="Purge">[[Purge (comic book)|''Purge'']]</ref> The [[2008]] reference book ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' confirmed that she managed to remain hidden from the Imperial Inquisitors and that she was killed by Darth Vader on [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|327|Wezz, Sia-Lan}}</ref>
